title: External-executor invocation contract: verbatim command, stdin prompt, absolute paths
action: Per AO17 (measured, not assumed), rewrite the External Executors dispatch protocol in swarming-reference.md so the configured command is the authority down to its argv. Step 3 currently instructs: `<command> -o .bee/workers/<id>.result.md - < .bee/workers/<id>.prompt.md > .bee/workers/<id>.out.log 2>/dev/null` — it APPENDS flags to the user's command. That breaks every command that is not codex-shaped (with `bash -lc '...'` the -o lands on bash, not the worker CLI). Replace with: the configured command is invoked VERBATIM; the prompt is piped on stdin; stdout goes to the job log; NOTHING is appended, ever. A CLI that wants -o puts it in its own configured command string. Second change, same cell: add the ABSOLUTE-PATH rule. Probe 3 (AO17) proved an external CLI's cwd is NOT the repo root and bee cannot make it so (agy relocated itself to ~/.gemini/antigravity-cli/scratch and created a phantom .bee/ there). Therefore every path a cli worker is handed — the contract file, the `node <abs>/.bee/bin/bee.mjs` helper invocations, the files it must touch — is ABSOLUTE. State plainly WHY: a relative path under a sandboxing CLI misfires silently and the worker still reports done. Also update the Constraints paragraph: bee no longer assumes the external CLI's cwd is the repo root.

truths: The configured command is run verbatim; bee appends no flags to it
The prompt reaches the worker on stdin, never as a shell-quoted arg
Every worker-facing path in a cli dispatch is absolute, because the external CLI's cwd is not the repo root
Acceptance stays by artifact (result.json), never by exit code — probe 2 (a WROTE reply with no file written) is the reason
artifacts: skills/bee-swarming/references/swarming-reference.md, External Executors section, steps 1-7 and Constraints
prohibitions: Do NOT keep any example that appends flags to <command>
Do NOT widen scope into bee-swarming/SKILL.md's degenerate check (that is Slice 2B, W2)
Do NOT change the four status tokens or the result.json shape

verify: ! grep -qF -- 'result.md - < .bee/workers/' skills/bee-swarming/references/swarming-reference.md && grep -qiF 'invoked verbatim' skills/bee-swarming/references/swarming-reference.md && grep -qiF 'absolute path' skills/bee-swarming/references/swarming-reference.md && echo CONTRACT_OK
